Which type of Azure resource supports the serverless configuration of an Azure SQL database?
options: SQL Server on Azure Virtual Machines
an Azure SQL Database elastic pool
a single database in Azure SQL Database
questions.correctAnswer: a single database in Azure SQL Database

You have the following T-SQL statement. SELECT o.OrderNo, o.OrderDate, c.Address, c.City FROM Order AS o JOIN Customer AS c ON o.Customer = c.ID; What is the function of the ON clause?

to match data in the Customer table to data in the Order table
to define an alias for the Customer table
to update data in the Order table
questions.correctAnswer: to match data in the Customer table to data in the Order table
